title: Why is the incense altars function and placement in the writings of Exodus so in contradistinction to the other vessels? Is it placed in front of the curtain or behind it?
body:
- circa the book of Hebrews placing the altar of incense in front of the ark of the covenant? 
- [super cool article that features the medieval Rabbi sforno largely](https://www.thetorah.com/article/the-gold-incense-altars-two-functions)
excerpt: - circa the book of Hebrews placing the altar of incense in front of the ark of the covenant?
